summary: Mobile snack shop app for selling goods on wheels
architectural_notes: Professional and unique UI/UX for food service app
About page should showcase business credibility and service coverage areas
Payment integration will require secure storage of bank account information
Phone number will serve as primary customer identifier for order pickup
known_issues: Upload functionality for snacks is currently failing

existing_features.title: Create a product catalog displaying snack items available for sale with name, description, price, and image for each item
Implement a shopping cart system allowing customers to add items, adjust quantities, and view cart total
Create an order checkout flow that captures customer contact information and order details

Design a professional, unique mobile-first interface with a cohesive food truck theme featuring warm, appetizing colors (oranges, reds, yellows), playful typography that evokes street food culture, and card-based layouts that work well on mobile screens
Display business branding with the name 'Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go' prominently in the header and integrate generated food truck and logo images as static assets
Add an admin interface with image upload capability that allows uploading product images for snack items in the catalog
Debug and fix the failing snack upload functionality in the admin interface to ensure images can be successfully uploaded and associated with catalog items
Create a dedicated snack management page that displays all snack items with their details (name, description, price, image) in an organized layout
Add navigation link to the new snack management page in the header navigation
Add delete functionality to the admin interface allowing removal of snack items from the catalog by their ID
Add a clear cart button to the Cart page that empties all items from the user's shopping cart
Create an order confirmation view accessible to customers showing their order has been confirmed after purchase
Add an admin order management interface displaying all submitted orders with their confirmation status and customer details
Add a delete button to each ProductCard component in the product catalog that allows customers to remove snack items from the catalog
Create an About page route at /about that is accessible from the main navigation
Display the business foundation year of 2026 prominently on the About page
Add compelling business details on the About page that highlight the unique value proposition and story of 'Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go'
Display the service area coverage on the About page, listing Southaven, Horn Lake, and Olive Branch, Mississippi as the cities served
Create an admin page with a form to enter and update bank account information for receiving customer payments
Add navigation link to the bank information admin page in the header navigation
Add a phone number input field to the checkout form that captures the customer's phone number during order placement
Display the customer's phone number in the order confirmation view shown to customers after purchase
Display the customer's phone number in the admin order management interface for each order to identify customers during pickup

new_feature_requests.summary: Extend the backend to handle image uploads, storing uploaded images and associating them with catalog items by product ID
Update the ProductCard component to display uploaded images instead of placeholder images when available
Create a dedicated snack page for viewing/managing snacks
Add delete option when uploading/managing snack items in admin interface
Add option to clear/delete entire shopping cart
Implement order confirmation system for both customer purchases and admin order management
Add delete button to every snack item in the catalog for easy removal
Create an About page highlighting business foundation in 2026, compelling business details, and service areas (Southaven, Horn Lake, and Olive Branch, Mississippi)
Add admin interface for entering/storing bank account information to receive customer payments
Modify checkout flow to collect customer phone number and display it with order details for pickup identification
Add a backend data structure to store bank account information including account holder name, bank name, account number, and routing number
Modify the Order data structure in the backend to include a customer phone number field

projectName: Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go
